full_text:
Wu Lan 吳蘭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Lan (吳蘭). Served Liu Yan and Zhang then Liu Bei. Killed in battle with Cao Zhang. Wu Lan was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Wu Lan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
